creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
This is the worst title I've seen in a long time.
From the patch, I deduced the OP was talking about the "devel/fb303" port although you could also deduce it from the comment.  Don't make us guess, just put the name of the port in the title!!

After all that, the PR is obsolete.  Bapt fixed this 13 days ago.
